name: Mining
description: Dig down carefully with torches and food. Avoid digging straight down.

name: Strip Mining
description: Mine long tunnels at Y=-59 for diamonds. Torches every 10 blocks. Watch for lava.

name: Caving
description: Explore natural caves for exposed ores. Bring torches, food, and armor.

name: Nether Exploration
description: Wear gold armor around piglins. Bring fire resistance. Build paths over lava.

name: Nether Fortress Route
description: Follow the x-axis. Fortresses generate perpendicular to x-axis.

name: Nether Safe Travel
description: Build tunnels with slabs to prevent spawns. Use warped fungi for striders.

name: Ender Dragon Fight
description: Destroy crystals with arrows or pillars. Attack the dragon when it perches.

name: End City Raiding
description: Bridge to outer islands. Find the ship for elytra. Watch for shulkers.

name: Wither Fight
description: Fight underground in a confined space. Use smite enchantment.

name: Warden Avoidance
description: Move slowly in the deep dark. Wool blocks vibrations. Distract with snowballs.

name: Villager Trading
description: Protect villagers. Give job blocks. Cure zombie villagers for discounts.

name: Villager Breeder
description: Build with beds, workstations, and food. Villagers with beds breed.

name: Zombie Villager Cure
description: Splash weakness, feed golden apple. Wait 2-5 min for discounted trades.

name: Farming
description: Plant on hydrated farmland. Use bonemeal. Keep light level high.

name: Automated Farm
description: Use water to collect crops. Observer + piston for automatic harvesting.

name: Animal Farming
description: Breed animals with their food. Keep in pens with water.

name: Honey Farming
description: Use shears for honeycomb, bottles for honey. Campfire under hive pacifies bees.

name: Base Defense
description: Light the area. Build walls. Use iron golems and traps.

name: Mob Grinder
description: Build a dark tower with water channels. Mobs fall to killing chamber.

name: Raid Defense
description: Ring a bell to reveal raiders. Walls and ranged attacks. Heal between waves.

name: Exploration
description: Bring food, torches, a bed, and a compass. Mark your path.

name: Combat Basics
description: Equip weapon and armor. Strafe. Retreat when low on health.

name: Enchanting
description: Bookshelves around the table. Anvil to combine enchanted books.

name: Brewing
description: Brewing stand. Nether wart is the base ingredient.

name: Potion Brewing Guide
description: Nether wart + water bottle = awkward potion. Add effect ingredient. Redstone for duration, glowstone for potency. Gunpowder for splash.

name: Smelting
description: Use furnaces for everything, blast furnaces for ores, smokers for food.

name: Redstone Basics
description: Power with redstone dust, torches, repeaters. Observers detect changes.

name: Redstone Clock
description: Repeater loop or observer loop for a repeating signal.

name: Item Sorter
description: Hoppers and comparators sort items by type into different chests.

name: Building
description: Plan foundations and storage. Use scaffolding. Light interiors.

name: Automation
description: Hoppers, droppers, dispensers, and observers automate farms and sorting.

name: Speedrun
description: Focus on wood, tools, iron, flint and steel, beds, and eyes of ender.

name: Speedrun Route
description: Get wood -> stone pick -> iron pick -> portal -> fortress -> bed kills blazes -> pearls from bartering -> eyes -> stronghold -> end.

name: Resource Management
description: Labeled chests for storage. Backup tools. Shulker boxes for travel.

name: Preparation
description: Before a big task, gather food, tools, armor, blocks, potions, and set spawn.

name: Recovery
description: After death, retrieve items before re-engaging threats.

name: Multiplayer
description: Coordinate roles, share resources, establish safe zones.

name: First Day Guide
description: Punch tree -> craft wood pick -> mine 19 stone -> stone tools -> furnace -> shelter before night.

name: Getting Iron Early
description: Find a cave or dig to Y=16. Iron generates between Y=-64 and Y=72.

name: Emergency Kit
description: Carry backup tools, food, blocks, water bucket, and bed in ender chest.

name: Piglin Bartering
description: Drop gold ingots near piglins. They give pearls, obsidian, fire resistance. Wear gold armor.

name: Safe Bridging
description: Walk backward while placing. Use scaffolding. Sneak at edges.

name: Water Elevator
description: Kelp makes bubble columns. Soul sand pushes up, magma pushes down.

name: Tree Farming
description: Plant saplings with 4+ blocks above. Oak needs less space.

name: Beacon Pyramid
description: Build a pyramid of mineral blocks. Full 4-layer = 164 blocks. Gives Haste, Speed, etc.

name: Safe Mining
description: Never dig straight down. Light up caves. Torches on left wall to find way back.

name: Raid Farm
description: Killer chamber with pillager spawner. Obtain totems and emeralds from waves.

name: Shulker Box Storage
description: Portable storage. Keeps items when broken. Color-code for organization.

name: Explosive Mining
description: Use beds in the Nether for ancient debris. TNT also works underground.

name: Crop Automation
description: Observers detect growth. Pistons harvest. Waterlogged blocks replace water.
